entry.name: Tegile_IntelliFlash_Events_API
entry.description:
Fetching events from Tegile Management Array console
Scope period: Past 24 hours Check period: 15 minutes Severity: Critical
NOTE: This datasource will not be applied until a event is generated by Tegile & any event detected will be active on the console 24 hours
entry.technology:
Developed by AS staff (Vitor Santos - 07/30/2020)
##Making use of IntelliFlash API v2.3/2.4
Using the module(s) below:
getRecentNotifications;

attribute.name: scriptgroovy

datapoint.name: Event
datapoint.alertbody:
##HOST## is reporting an event fault, placing it it into ##LEVEL## state. Please access the device in order to review/address this condition.
EventStart (within Tegile console) -> ##auto.tegileevent.time##
datapoint.description: This will cause an alarm to hit the console (since an event was mapped)

datapoint.name: CreationTime
datapoint.description: Unix epoch time for the actual event start time (the Instance itself has a property with this value in a readable format -> auto.TegileEvent.time)
